ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "cp" INTEGER /* Chest pain type (0: typical angina, 1: atypical angina, 2: non-anginal pain, 3: asymptomatic) */,
  "trtbps" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure (in mm Hg) */,
  "chol" INTEGER /* Serum cholesterol (in mg/dl) */,
  "fbs" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar > 120 mg/dl (1 for true, 0 for false) */,
  "restecg" INTEGER /* Resting electrocardiogram results (0: normal, 1: having ST-T wave abnormality, 2: showing probable or definite left ventricular hypertrophy) */,
  "thalach" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exng" INTEGER /* Exercise induced angina (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "oldpeak" REAL /* ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "slp" INTEGER /* Slope of the peak exercise ST segment (0: upsloping, 1: flat, 2: downsloping) */,
  "caa" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels (0-3) colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thall" INTEGER /* Thalassemia (3: normal, 6: fixed defect, 7: reversable defect) */,
  "output" INTEGER /* Output class (1 for heart disease, 0 for no heart disease) */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Boolean (1 for smoker, 0 for non-smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumer" INTEGER /* Boolean (1 for alcohol consumer, 0 for non-consumer) */,
  "family_history" INTEGER /* Boolean (1 for family history of heart disease, 0 for no history) */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient on whom the test was performed */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the diagnostic test */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who ordered the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "test_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the test */,
  "insurance_coverage" INTEGER /* Boolean (1 for covered, 0 for not covered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_tests_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient to whom the medication was prescribed */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "refill_count" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  "prescription_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the prescription in days */,
  "prescription_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the prescription */,
  "insurance_coverage" INTEGER /* Boolean (1 for covered, 0 for not covered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient on whom the procedure was performed */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical procedure */,
  "procedure_date" TEXT /* Date when the procedure was performed */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the medical procedure */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who performed the procedure */,
  "procedure_location" TEXT /* Location where the procedure was performed */,
  "procedure_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the procedure */,
  "insurance_coverage" INTEGER /* Boolean (1 for covered, 0 for not covered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the doctor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "medical_license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the doctor is affiliated */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who visited */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who attended the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date when the visit occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis provided during the visit */,
  "visit_location" TEXT /* Location where the visit took place */,
  "visit_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the visit */,
  "insurance_coverage" INTEGER /* Boolean (1 for covered, 0 for not covered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, researcher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, data access, data modification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
